tweets.full_text:
This is actually a smart take from $KGNT.

Everyone talks about open AI agents and ERC 8004 but in reality, why would a serious trading agent expose its private endpoints or internal infrastructure publicly onchain?

Imagine a hedge fund agent revealing the exact pipes it uses to execute trades. Makes no sense.

What KOGENT is building is much more practical. The agent identity stays public and verifiable, while the sensitive infrastructure stays hidden behind signed access control.

So you still get interoperability and discoverability without forcing every agent to operate naked on the internet.

Feels like one of the first teams thinking about how enterprise AI agents would actually work in the real world.

user.name: Hawk Of Crypto
user.description:
TG: https://t.co/gojICBGe9a
Whatever I share is just my opinion and not financial advice!

quoted_status.full_text:
Why should every agent data be public?

ERC-8004 is designed for open agent markets. Discoverable. Verifiable. Interoperable. But not every agent can afford to be fully public. Enterprise agents cannot expose internal infrastructure. Trading agents cannot reveal proprietary endpoints. The open registry becomes a liability.

KOGENT introduces a tri-layer architecture for agent privacy.
Powered by Base, Filecoin and KOGENT.

@base is home to 85% of all x402 transaction volume. The largest live agent ecosystem onchain. KOGENT attestation contract live on Base mainnet. Every private agent identity mints as an ERC-8004 NFT.

@Filecoin via Synapse SDK connects agents directly to Filecoin Onchain Cloud. KOGENT uses it to store public agent cards with two independent storage providers, automatic payments, and cryptographic proof of data possession recorded onchain daily. No human in the loop. No central server. No trust required.

KOGENT disclosure server holds the private endpoints. Behind a signed ownership challenge. No signature. No access. No exceptions.
No endpoint URL ever touches a public ledger. Every layer independently verifiable.

First ever private agent creation on ERC-8004. Beta launch soon.

user.name: Hardwired
user.description: If it has to exist for AI and Robotics to scale, we're watching it.

tweets.full_text:
most traders are still manually testing ideas like it’s 2018

open chart, spot pattern

convince themselves they found edge

lose money slowly enough to call it “learning”

meanwhile a few people have already stopped trading like humans

they’re building AI quant systems that test 1,000 strategies a week while they sleep

not indicators or “buy when RSI hits 30” twitter nonsense

actual research loops

feature pipelines that generate signals humans would never think to test

validation stacks that kill bad ideas before they ever touch capital

production monitors catching decay before most traders even realize their edge died

that’s the real shift happening right now

market isn’t becoming harder because people got smarter

it’s becoming harder because your competition stopped being people

some guy with Claude and a decent codebase can now brute-force more strategy research in 7 days than an old-school discretionary trader could do in a year

and every week his system gets sharper

while most people are still screenshotting charts and asking “bullish?”

that gap compounds fast

because once your research process becomes code, every improvement stacks forever

> every test makes the next one faster
> failure teaches the loop what to kill earlier
> surviving strategy feeds the machine

that’s how people quietly go from “learning quant” to running systems that feel unfair to compete against

and the weirdest part is most people still think this requires a hedge fund

it doesn’t

just curiosity, patience, and enough obsession to let code do what human intuition never could

bookmark this

because pretty soon “i trade with AI” is gonna sound as normal as saying you use TradingView

and people building these systems now will already be years ahead of everyone still drawing lines on charts

tweets.full_text:
202605 Xアルゴリズム
断片的に目立ったところだけ見てたけど
この週末にゴリゴリに調べたので
整理して出していく
・・・いけたらいいなぁ

自分が調べるうえでも、X上の分析も眺めましたが
X情報がメインでないパワーインフルが
ちょっと生成AIで出してみましたのような
古かったり間違ったポストがバズりまくってて
これがまた生成AIのX情報を汚染するなと
少し悲しく思いました。

メインなのに書いてる人もいますが…
そっちのが問題か
